content.problemStatement:
In this task, you will use the Dog API to fetch a random dog image URL and display it in the console.

The API endpoint is: `https://dog.ceo/api/breeds/image/random`

This endpoint returns a JSON object with a key called `message` that contains the URL of a random dog image. Your task is to make a GET request to this endpoint using `axios` and print the image URL to the console.

#### Task:
1. Complete the api route to get the image and send show it on the html page.


#### Note:
You can read about this api [here](https://dog.ceo/dog-api/).
